template.name: Automated Invoice Generation Workflow
template.description: Enterprise-grade automated invoice generation with approval workflows, multi-tier validation, and integration with major accounting systems. Includes smart templates, tax calculations, payment terms automation, and comprehensive audit trails.
template.author: Claude Financial Automation Specialist
useCases: Automated B2B invoice generation with approval chains
Project-based billing with time tracking integration
Multi-entity invoice processing for enterprise organizations
Compliance-driven invoice workflows for regulated industries
requirements: Valid API credentials for accounting software (QuickBooks/Xero/SAP)

workflow.name: Invoice Generation Master Workflow
workflow.description: Comprehensive invoice generation workflow with approval chains, validation, and multi-system integration

triggers.name: Invoice Creation API Trigger
triggers.description: Webhook endpoint to receive invoice creation requests from external systems

triggers.name: Recurring Invoice Generation
triggers.description: Automated recurring invoice generation based on subscription schedules

triggers.name: Manual Invoice Creation
triggers.description: Manual invoice creation with guided form interface

blocks.name: Invoice Data Validation
blocks.description: Comprehensive validation of incoming invoice data including customer verification, line item validation, and business rule compliance

invoiceData.description: Raw invoice data from trigger or manual input

validationResult.description: Validation result with sanitized data or errors

blocks.name: Approval Routing Logic
blocks.description: Intelligent routing based on invoice amount, customer type, and business rules to determine approval requirements

conditions.name: High Value Invoice Approval
conditions.description: Route to high-value approval workflow for invoices over $10,000

conditions.name: New Customer Approval
conditions.description: Route to new customer approval for first-time or low-credit customers

conditions.name: International Invoice Approval
conditions.description: Route to international approval for foreign currency invoices

blocks.name: High Value Invoice Approval
blocks.description: Multi-tier approval workflow for high-value invoices with escalation and timeout handling

blocks.name: Advanced Tax Calculation
blocks.description: Comprehensive tax calculation supporting multiple jurisdictions, tax exemptions, and real-time rate updates

invoiceData.description: Invoice data with line items for tax calculation

taxCalculatedInvoice.description: Invoice data with complete tax calculations

blocks.name: Professional Invoice PDF Generation
blocks.description: Generate professional, branded PDF invoices with compliance features, multiple language support, and accessibility standards

invoiceData.description: Complete invoice data with tax calculations

pdfBuffer.description: Generated PDF invoice as binary buffer

pdfUrl.description: URL to access the generated PDF

blocks.name: Accounting System Integration Router
blocks.description: Route invoice data to appropriate accounting system based on configuration

blocks.name: QuickBooks Online Integration
blocks.description: Create invoice in QuickBooks Online with complete data synchronization

blocks.name: Invoice Delivery & Notifications
blocks.description: Send professional invoice emails with PDF attachments, payment links, and tracking

blocks.name: Comprehensive Audit Trail
blocks.description: Log all invoice generation activities for compliance, auditing, and troubleshooting purposes

testScenarios.name: High Value Invoice Approval
testScenarios.description: Test approval workflow for high-value invoices
